case_title: DOAN HOAI XUAN VS MACK STEVE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MACK STEVE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DOAN HOAI XUAN AS TO DEFENDANT MACK STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOAN HOAI XUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACK STEVE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,029.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
